Armor Steal Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit steals 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% / 17% / 20% physical armor from the nearest enemy fighter for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 16% / 17% / 18% / 19% / 20% / 22% / 25% physical and magic armor from 3 nearby enemy fighters for 5 sec.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while, the unit steals 21% / 22% / 23% / 24% / 25% / 27% / 30% physical and magic armor from all enemy fighters for 5 sec.
